'''''Star Wars: Empire: Betrayal''''' was the first story arc in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]''. It consisted of issues 1 through 4.

==Plot summary==
Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]] are plotting to remove the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] and his [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|apprentice]]. Their betrayal has been a long time coming, and they have prepared a group of [[clone stormtrooper]]s loyal only to them. Their first task is to remove Darth Vader from the picture and send him on a [[Dargulli Dark Jedi|fool's errand]], but he is saved by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. The conspirators plan starts falling apart when the members betray one another. The final Moff gets all the way to the Emperor's Throne Room, but is [[Force lightning/Legends|executed]] by [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] himself, who reveals he knew of the plan the whole time and wanted to remove any threats to his power.
